ruby.title: Probability Analysis
ruby.insight: Model placed bob olinger at position 2 (25.0% probability) vs top pick Teahupoo (35.0%). Underestimated winning horse by ~10.0 percentage points.

keenan.title: Forecast & Distribution
keenan.insight: Top forecast prediction was Teahupoo > Bob Olinger, but actual result was Bob Olinger > Teahupoo. Distribution model underestimated variance in placing combinations.

mordin.title: Market Alignment
mordin.insight: Winner Bob Olinger had well-aligned model/market values (divergence 0.0%). Market pricing efficient for this outcome.
